description_long: This object is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply pointed nose. It features twin vertical stabilizers at the rear, swept-back wings with a low-wing configuration, and prominent engine nacelles mounted near the fuselage. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and is enclosed with a streamlined canopy, likely accommodating two seats. The landing gear is deployed, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel. The surface is finished in a matte gray color, typical of tactical aircraft, and the overall design emphasizes speed, maneuverability, and stealth.
description: A sleek, gray military jet with swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and a forward, enclosed cockpit. The airplane has a matte finish and visible landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, swept-back wings, twin vertical stabilizers, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow fuselage, cockpit canopy, wing sweep, and the twin vertical stabilizers visible behind the wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the engine nacelles, landing gear, and tail configuration.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the twin engine exhausts, twin vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets and moderate dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a streamlined canopy, likely multi-seat.
